titleEn: Hy-Line hosts II Latin America Seminar for White Layers in Brazil
titleZh: 海兰国际在巴西举办第二届拉丁美洲白羽蛋鸡研讨会
summaryZh: 2025年8月，海兰国际在巴西伊瓜苏瀑布举办第二届拉丁美洲白羽蛋鸡研讨会，吸引320名区域领先蛋鸡生产商及行业专业人士参与。会议涵盖遗传学、营养、管理和商业策略，亮点包括人工智能、鸡蛋销售策略及废弃物可持续管理最佳实践等主题演讲。活动以参观伊瓜苏瀑布结束，促进交流合作。
featuredReason: 该新闻展示了传统蛋鸡育种企业如何将人工智能、可持续管理等前沿议题融入行业培训，对智慧畜牧从业者理解技术落地场景和行业趋势有参考价值。
contentFull: Genetics and breeding Genetics and traits Genetics Hy-Line hosts II Latin America Seminar for White Layers in Brazil Highlights included guest presentations on Artificial Intelligence, “How to Sell Eggs,” and Best Practices for Sustainable Management of Residuals. 3 February 2026 1 minute read By: Hy-Line International In August 2025, Hy-Line, together with several sponsors, welcomed 320 of the region’s leading egg producers and allied industry professionals to the II Hy-Line Latin America Seminar for White Layers in Iguazu Falls, Brazil. Over three days, participants engaged in technical sessions covering genetics, nutrition, management, and business strategies for the regional egg industry. Highlights included guest presentations on Artificial Intelligence, “How to Sell Eggs,” and Best Practices for Sustainable Management of Residuals. The event concluded with a memorable visit to one of the world’s natural wonders, the breathtaking Iguazu Falls, which provided an inspiring backdrop for networking and collaboration. translationZh: 2025年8月，海兰国际与多家赞助商合作，在巴西伊瓜苏瀑布迎来了320名区域领先的蛋鸡生产商及行业专业人士，参加第二届海兰国际拉丁美洲白羽蛋鸡研讨会。在为期三天的活动中，与会者参与了涵盖遗传学、营养、管理和商业策略的技术会议，聚焦区域蛋鸡产业。亮点包括关于人工智能、“如何销售鸡蛋”以及废弃物可持续管理最佳实践的嘉宾演讲。活动以参观世界自然奇观之一——壮观的伊瓜苏瀑布作为结束，为交流与合作提供了鼓舞人心的背景。
contentHtml:
Hy-Line hosts II Latin America Seminar for White Layers in Brazil 
Highlights included guest presentations on Artificial Intelligence, “How to Sell Eggs,” and Best Practices for Sustainable Management of Residuals.
